title: Enhanced Channel Routing
changes: Improved global channel routing for better message handling
Enhanced adapter disconnection logic for increased reliability

title: Enhanced Verdict Tracking
changes: New wizard_block_kind added to freelance listings for improved verdict tracking.

title: Enhanced Agent Engine Features
changes: Improved handling of hallucinations in the agent engine for better accuracy.
Enhanced tool management capabilities, allowing for more effective use of tools.

title: OAuth and Freelance Wizard Enhancements
changes: Improved management of OAuth tokens for better security and usability.
Added hourly analysis for Find Workable feature of freelance.

title: Freelance Wizard Enhancement
changes: The freelance wizard now fetches client data to improve quality gate evaluation.

title: Linux Build Support
changes: Added support for building AgentDesk on Linux.

title: New Freelance Wizard Feature
changes: Extract budget data from HTML in freelance wizard functionality

title: Enhanced Project Management and UI
changes: Added path accessibility checks for cloud and network paths in project management.
Improved UI and functionality for freelance components.
Fixed benign ResizeObserver warning in global error handler.

title: Enhanced Freelance Listings
changes: New full description modal added to freelance listing cards for better details.
Fixed race condition in wizard verdict persistence, ensuring immediate UI updates.

title: Enhanced Freelance Features
changes: Improved chat and proposal features with new quick starts and caching enhancements for a smoother experience.

title: Enhanced Client Filtering Options
changes: New client filter options added to the freelance settings tab
Client quality filtering now available in freelance listings and settings

title: New AI-Generated Release Notes
changes: Introducing AI-generated release notes functionality for easier tracking of updates.
Enhanced output formatting for improved readability of release notes.

title: Auto-Earn — AI handles your Freelancer.com inbox
changes: Auto-Earn: AI can now automatically reply to client messages and submit bids on Freelancer.com
Assisted mode — AI drafts every reply and bid, you review and click Send
Full-auto mode — AI sends autonomously within your configured limits (opt-in, requires explicit confirmation)
Smart triage — payments, contracts, off-platform requests, and scope disputes are always routed to you, never auto-replied
Governor limits — hourly message caps, daily bid budgets, and active-hours windows keep behaviour within safe bounds
Humanizer built in — all AI-written messages are stripped of AI patterns and special characters so they read like you wrote them
Anomaly protection — Auto-Earn pauses automatically if the platform returns rate limits or suspicious responses
Escalation inbox — important situations surface as notifications via desktop and your connected channels (Discord, WhatsApp, Email)
Earnings dashboard — track bids sent, replies made, and jobs in progress from the Freelance tab

title: Freelance improvements, Humanizer skill & more
changes: Sent bids no longer reappear in Drafts & queue after marking as placed
Listings tab now shows a Bid Placed badge once a proposal has been sent
New built-in Humanizer skill — instruct any agent to write like a real person, not an AI
Freelance agents now use humanizer rules automatically so bids avoid AI patterns and special characters
Agent input dialogs now show the agent name and its color instead of a generic title
What's New popup — you'll now see a summary of changes after each update
